calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-27-2006 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-27-2006 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: This cause was scheduled for Court TrialHearing on this day.
This cause was re-assigned by the PJ. for settlement on the record.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: E. Bura, CSR: Janet Pond.
David Brilliant, Esq. for Plaintiff: Gerda Kircher.
Bruce Sandifer, Esq. for Defendant, Samual French.
Parties reached a settlement by Stipulation.
Terms of the settlement were read into the record as follows:
Defendant agree to vacate the premises at 1272 Market Street, #209, San Francisco by noon on April 17, 2006.
If defendant complies to the agreement, plaintiff will waive back rent, costs and damages of $2631.25.
If defendant failed to vacate, judgment for plaintiff.
Parties released each other from all claims.
Parties signed a stipulation of the settlement, however it will not be filed with the court.
Parties agree to terms in open court. Matter was deemed settled and trial was vacated.
